返回小說天地Fiction 返回首頁Home

中篇小說·黑龍江左岸The Left Bank of the Heilongjiang River
A Historical Novella

歷史，不會因為時間流逝而消失， 何況， 這才過去幾十年。 庚子年， 也就是公元一九零零年，在中國東北黑龍江左岸，發生過一起震驚世界、卻逐漸被人遺忘的人間慘劇。當年的沙皇帝俄政府，為了奪取中國領土，在黑龍江左岸，蓄意製造大屠殺，無數無辜的中國老百姓，失去了生命， 失去了家園。 一九五七年，北京大學歷史系二年級學生青兒，因研究這段歷史，被打成右派，遣返家鄉勞動改造。她與同樣熱愛歷史的同學盧正鋼，在遭受政治災難後，雖身陷絕境，卻始終沒有放棄自己的信念，也沒有忘記研究歷史的初心。 當他們幾乎失去一切時，仍頂著巨大的壓力，深入深山老林，走訪一位又一位倖存老人，試圖在最後一位證人離世之前，留下那段幾乎消失的歷史真相。 也正因如此，他們最後的悲慘命運，幾乎從一開始，就已經注定。 《黑龍江左岸》是作者野山鹿鳴創作的一部以真實歷史事件為背景的中篇歷史小說，作品以人物命運為主線，以歷史記憶為血肉，在愛情、理想、信念與苦難之間，展現一代青年面對歷史與命運時的選擇。 那些被遺忘的人，不應被遺忘；那些被掩埋的歷史，也終將重見天日。 本系列故事，即由此展開。
本系列文章目錄
中篇小說·黑龍江左岸（101）The Left Bank of the Heilongjiang River (101) 中篇小說·黑龍江左岸（102）The Left Bank of the Heilongjiang River (102) 中篇小說·黑龍江左岸（103）The Left Bank of the Heilongjiang River (103) 中篇小說·黑龍江左岸（104）The Left Bank of the Heilongjiang River (104) 中篇小說·黑龍江左岸（105）The Left Bank of the Heilongjiang River (105) 中篇小說·黑龍江左岸（106）The Left Bank of the Heilongjiang River (106)

The Left Bank of the Heilongjiang River
A Historical Novella中篇小說·黑龍江左岸

History does not disappear simply because time has passed—especially when only a few decades have gone by. In the Gengzi Year of 1900, a tragedy unfolded along the left bank of the Heilongjiang River in northeastern China. It shocked the world at the time, yet has gradually faded from public memory. In its determination to seize Chinese territory, the Tsarist Russian government deliberately carried out massacres along the left bank of the river. Countless innocent Chinese civilians lost their lives, their homes, and everything they possessed. In 1957, Qing'er, a second-year history student at Peking University, was branded a Rightist for researching this forgotten chapter of history and was sent back to her homeland for "reform through labor." Together with her fellow student, Lu Zhenggang, who shared her passion for history, she endured political persecution without surrendering either her convictions or her original aspiration to uncover the truth. Even after losing almost everything, they pressed on under immense pressure, venturing deep into the remote forests to seek out one surviving witness after another. Before the last eyewitnesses disappeared forever, they hoped to preserve a historical truth that was on the verge of being lost. It was precisely because of this choice that their tragic fate was, in many ways, sealed from the very beginning. The Left Bank of the Heilongjiang River is a historical novella by Yeshan Luming, inspired by real historical events. Through the intertwined themes of love, ideals, faith, suffering, and historical memory, it follows the destinies of two young people as they struggle to choose between silence and truth in the face of history and fate. Those who have been forgotten should not remain forgotten. The history that has been buried will one day emerge into the light again. And so, this story begins.
